Title: Sweden's far right violated the kvittningssystem. And it's causing chaos in Parliament
Subhead: With three months to go before the general election, scheduled for September 13, chaos reigns in Stockholm's Parliament. At the heart of the matter is the decision by lawmakers from the Sweden Democrats party to break a cross-party pact that had ensured the smooth running of the chamber.

Title: Imprisoned French journalist wasn't at coach Deschamps's press conference. But a fellow reporter made sure his question was asked
Subhead: Still behind bars in Algeria, Christoph Gleizes managed to ask a question to the national football team coach on Monday, through a fellow reporter, on the eve of France's first World Cup match against Senegal.

Title: JR's new and improved Pont-Neuf cavern reopens
Subhead: The artist announced on social media on Monday that his ephemeral work, 'La Caverne du Pont-Neuf,' was reopening three days ahead of schedule. It was repaired and strengthened after strong winds had damaged it two weeks ago.
